question.label: Principal impact evidence
question.name: What have you done recently that best shows Principal-level leverage on this team?
question.description: Surfaces concrete examples of visible leverage rather than steady execution.

answer: I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.

assessment.note: He names independent calls but says he still defaults to safety, which weakens visible leverage and signals strong engagement caution; also points to a gap-naming thread around 'playing safe'.
